note: DESIGN-SIDE ONLY anchor map for the Activity destination (ActivitySurface in design-kit/app-v3/copilot-app.jsx:14-40 over the ACTIVITY fixture in copilot-data.jsx:149-164). All 22 selectors verified to match 1/1 against http://127.0.0.1:8113/design-kit/app-v3/index.html?dest=activity&state=default. The `live` field is intentionally null — a follow-up task binds each label to the live app's selector and renames this file to anchors.json. Inline styles applied by the design (and therefore part of the baseline) are recorded in `inline`.

elements.label: page.container
elements.what: scrolling page body — padding 20px 24px 40px, max-width 960px, overflow auto

elements.label: page.lead
elements.what: explanatory lead paragraph, 12px/1.6 --mut, margin -2px 0 18px, max-width 72ch

elements.label: page.lead.link
elements.what: inline 'Settings → Privacy' link (accent rgb(95,178,236)) — navigates to settings/privacy for retention, export, delete

elements.label: topbar.title
elements.what: destination title 'Activity', 13.5px

elements.label: topbar.sub
elements.what: destination subtitle 'every action the agent has taken', 11.5px --mut2

elements.label: rail.badge
elements.what: '1' active-run badge on the Run rail item, 13x13 mono 8.5px — present on every non-Run destination

elements.label: day.head
elements.what: day-group heading ('Today'), mono 10px --mut2, margin 18px 0 8px, display:flex gap:10px with a ::after flex:1 1px hairline

elements.label: rowlist
elements.what: bordered card list per day group — 1px --line, radius 8px, background --panel, overflow hidden

elements.label: row.live
elements.what: running run row — <button>, flex, gap 12px, padding 11px 14px, 1px bottom hairline, pointer cursor

elements.label: row.live.ic
elements.what: 28x28 radius-7 icon tile; live rows get inline style color:var(--jade)

elements.label: row.live.ic.svg
elements.what: brand Mark glyph for the live row; NB the JSX size={18} is overridden to 15x15 by .lrow__ic svg

elements.label: row.live.name
elements.what: run title, 12.5px/500 --tx, flex row align-center gap 8px (title + chip)

elements.label: row.live.chip
elements.what: 'running' status pill — chip--ok jade, mono 10.5px, radius 999px, INLINE padding 1px 8px overriding the base 2px 8px

elements.label: row.live.dot
elements.what: 6x6 currentColor liveness dot, rendered ONLY inside a running chip

elements.label: row.live.sub
elements.what: run summary line, 11px --mut2; INLINE font-family:var(--body) overrides the .lrow__sub mono default — Activity subs are SANS

elements.label: row.live.time
elements.what: run time '11:44', mono 10.5px --mut2, flex:none

elements.label: row.live.chevron
elements.what: trailing chevron-right, 15x15 --mut2 — rendered ONLY on live rows (the navigable affordance)

elements.label: row.done.ic.svg
elements.what: clock glyph for non-live rows, 15x15 --mut (no jade override on the tile)

elements.label: row.done.chip
elements.what: 'done' pill — chip--ok jade, no dot

elements.label: row.done.spacer
elements.what: 16x0 spacer <span> that replaces the chevron on non-live rows — keeps the time column aligned across live/non-live rows

elements.label: chip.paused
elements.what: 'paused' pill — chip--warn amber rgb(232,180,94)

elements.label: chip.stopped
elements.what: 'stopped' pill — chip--off muted rgb(100,100,109)
